name: Client Follow-Up
description: Never lose a deal or damage a relationship because you forgot to follow up. Tracks every client interaction and sends timely, personalized follow-ups so you stay top-of-mind without a full CRM.
author: ProwlrBot Team

before_after.before: Promising to 'circle back next week' and forgetting, letting warm leads go cold, scrambling through old emails to remember where a conversation left off
before_after.after: Every client relationship tracked with automatic follow-ups, context-rich reminders, and a pipeline view showing exactly who needs attention today

user_stories.quote: I'm a freelance photographer and I follow up with every couple 3 months after their wedding. This automates those check-ins and I've gotten 8 referrals from it.
user_stories.name: Jasmine K.

user_stories.quote: I manage 40+ client accounts. Before this, at least 3 would go quiet every month because I forgot to check in. Now nothing falls through.
user_stories.name: David L.

user_stories.quote: The follow-up emails it drafts sound exactly like me. Clients have no idea they're automated. One even replied 'you always remember to check in, I love that.'
user_stories.name: Sonia M.

setup_steps.instruction: Connect your email account (Gmail or Outlook) so the agent can track client conversations.
Import your client list or let the agent build one from your recent email history.
Set default follow-up intervals — e.g., 3 days after a proposal, 1 week after a meeting, monthly for existing clients.
Choose whether follow-ups should be auto-sent or queued as drafts for your review.
Customize the follow-up tone and style so messages sound like you, not a robot.
